body.summary: Auto-generated adapter package for Fallback Example from minimal docs + API key input.
body.config_fragment:
[generated_sources.providers.fallback_example]
enabled = true
api_key_envs = ['FALLBACK_EXAMPLE_API_KEY']
base_url = "https://api.fallback.example"
docs_url = "https://fallback.example/docs"
category = "options"
auth_style = "bearer"
response_format = "json"

config_candidate.docs_summary: https://fallback.example/docs Base URL: https://api.fallback.example Options chain API with JSON payloads. Authorization header uses bearer token. /v1/options

body.generated_test_code:
from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_sources.fallback_example import FallbackExampleSource


def test_fallback_example_adapter_builds_query_paths(monkeypatch) -> None:
    adapter = FallbackExampleSource(base_url="https://api.fallback.example")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((path, params or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "path": path, "params": params or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.fetch_options("AAPL")
    adapter.fetch_option_history("AAPL", interval="1d", lookback="1mo")

    assert len(calls) == 2
    assert calls[0][0] == 'fallback'
    assert calls[1][0] == 'options/history'
    assert calls[0][1]['symbol'] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][1]['interval'] == "1d"
body.interface_documentation_summary: https://fallback.example/docs Base URL: https://api.fallback.example Options chain API with JSON payloads. Authorization header uses bearer token. /v1/options
